name: Spa Pizzas
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 3 tbsp olive oil in a heavy medium saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onions and cook until golden, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in tomato sauce, garlic (if using), oregano, and Italian seasoning.
4. Simmer until thickened, about five minutes.
5. Heat remaining olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
6. Add mushrooms and zucchini; cook until tender, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes. Set aside.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Place tortillas on a baking sheet and bake until crisp, about 4 minutes.
9. Spread about 1/4 cup of sauce over each tortilla.
10. Sprinkle each with about 1/4 cup cheese.
11. Top pizzas with mushrooms, zucchini, peppers, and olives.
12. Bake until cheese melts, about 5 minutes. Serve.
